scripts.build: bun run validate:routes && bun run scripts/validate-homepage-sections.mjs && bun run scripts/validate-design-system-contract.mjs && bun run validate:conversion-hierarchy && bun run validate:accessibility-foundation && bun run validate:story-5-3 && bun run validate:story-5-4 && bun run validate:story-5-5 && astro build
scripts.workers:preview: bun run workers:check && bun run build && bun run scripts/validate-workers-config.mjs --require-generated-config && wrangler dev --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.workers:deploy: bun run workers:check && bun run build && bun run scripts/validate-workers-config.mjs --require-generated-config && wrangler deploy --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.validate: bun run typecheck && bun run lint
